mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM material_info
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND status = 1 AND audit_status = 1 AND publish_status = 1
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_info (title, summary, category_id, grade, subject, keyword, uploader_id, audit_status, publish_status, download_count, favorite_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{categoryId}, #{grade}, #{subject}, #{keyword}, #{uploaderId}, #{auditStatus}, #{publishStatus}, #{downloadCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE material_info SET download_count = download_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE material_info SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE material_info SET favorite_count = IF(favorite_count > 0, favorite_count - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_info WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_info WHERE status = 1 AND audit_status = #{auditStatus}
